In this note we investigate how to implement neural networks in python using 'PyTorch' for recognizing handwritten digits using the MNIST dataset.  We shall be following the guide [MNIST Handwritten Digit Recognition in PyTorch](https://nextjournal.com/gkoehler/pytorch-mnist) provided by [Gregor Koehler](https://nextjournal.com/gkoehler) in his article on [Nextjournal](https://nextjournal.com/home).
